iPhone 17 One Month Later 

After using the iPhone 17 for over four weeks, I’ve realized this phone is really all about the perfect balance between speed, design, and daily usability. Among the iPhone releases this year, the iPhone 17 strikes that perfect middle ground.

In this long-term review, I’ll share how it performs in real-world scenarios: from productivity, creative work, gaming, and everyday use. If you’ve been deciding between the base model and the Pro, this video might help you see why the iPhone 17 could be the sweet spot for most people.

snippet.title: TOCOL iPhone 17 Pro Max Case Review – Cheap, Ugly, and Weirdly Good
snippet.description:
This is one of the cheapest iPhone 17 cases I’ve tested so far, and I honestly expected it to fall apart. But after putting it through my full 30-drop test, this TOCOL case somehow held its own. It’s like super fresh gas station sushi...questionable at first glance, surprisingly not bad when you actually try it.

Get your own TOCOL for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case, Camera Control, Compatible with Magsafe, Shatterproof Translucent Matte Phone Case  by using this link: 
*This is an Amazon affiliate link that will bring you to the right Amazon store for your location

#ReviewerNotInfluencer #Reviews #iPhone

In this video:
0:00 Intro
0:30 Design
1:08 Handling & Usability
1:51 Protection Features
2:21 Drop Protection
3:38 Should You Get It?

TOCOL for iPhone 17 Pro Max Case, Camera Control, Compatible with Magsafe, Shatterproof Translucent Matte Phone Case  Review

-this case makes me chuckle
-because its your typical "bare minimum product"
-do the very least and hope for the best
-case is fairly smooth
-there's a PC back and the camera area has a PC cover as well
-the two aren't joined so there's a bit of flex there
-TOCOL didn't even bother re-tooling the back as the Apple logo is covered

-handling is borderline terrible
-the TPU edge has no finish and is super slick
-this case is going to add 35g to the weight of your iphone
-and only increase the bulk by 45% which is on the lower end
-now here's where things get interesting
-for corner drops, this thing performed well
-Inital impact was 9.4G's which is 9% better than average
-the settling rate of the case is way higher and longer
-around 34% slower mostly because of the pure TPU corners
-BUT the intial drop takes a big enough bite that the total force is about 7% better

-the values from the intial drop were cool to say, especially from a case with such thing corners

-for face frist drops, intial impact was better by 16%
-the settling rate was brutal again, 46% slower
-but the total force was 20% better

-these values were surprising to me. Didn't expect a budget case to perform like this

-corner lump drops were a different story
-the intial impact was higher by 16%
-decay rate was still slower by 16%
-and the total force going into the phone was 10% higher
-this doesn't seem too surprising as I'm seeing a similar trend with other PC covered camera lump cases
-corners of this case are 1.9mm
-back is 1.5
-case has air bumpers but they're very shallow
-overall, the size of this case is right up there with the Apple silicone

-for the back rigidity, because the PC pieces aren't connected, it flexes a lot
-took 19.3 to bend at 8mm, 34% worse than average

-for magsafe, it took 10.6N to pull things off and 10.9 to push
-oddly an above average performance
-buttons are integrated into the case 
-so it goes squish when you press it
-the camera button is covered and works
-BUT it sits flush on the case edge so it's hard to find
-Lazy
-BUT TOCOL chamfered the port cutout so it's comfortable for the pinky proper-uppers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: iPhone 17 Pro Max: 45 Days Later... The Truth
snippet.description:
I’ve been using the iPhone 17 Pro Max as my daily driver for 45 days, and this is my honest experience with it. Just what actually changed and how it feels in real world use.

In this video, I talk about the redesigned feel in the hand, the improved cooling system, the stronger battery life, the display visibility outdoors, and the refinements to the camera system. I also share how I protect my phone and why I chose the setup I’m using this video is not sponsored.

If you’re thinking about upgrading to the iPhone 17 Pro Max, especially from the 16 Pro Max or earlier, I hope this helps you understand whether it’s right for you.

TORRAS Ostand Q3 Air Case (not sponsored)
TORRAS OrigArmor AR Tempered Glass (not sponsored)

Thanks for watching.

snippet.title: ใครเร็วกว่า ประหยัดกว่า ร้อนกว่า iPhone 17 Pro Max iOS 26.1 VS iOS 26.2 Beta 1
snippet.description:
พบกับการทดสอบเปรียบเทียบความเร็ว และอายุการใช้งานแบตเตอรี่ระหว่าง iOS 26.1 และ iOS 26.2 Beta 1 บน iPhone 17 Pro Max ที่ทุกคนรอคอย! คลิปนี้จะพาเพื่อนๆ ไปดูว่าการอัปเดตล่าสุดจาก Apple มีผลกระทบอย่างไรต่อประสิทธิภาพ และอายุการใช้งานแบตเตอรี่ เพื่อให้เพื่อนๆ เห็นภาพชัดเจนเกี่ยวกับประสิทธิภาพของแต่ละเวอร์ชันของ iOS 

ทำไมคุณต้องดูวิดีโอนี้:
- ค้นพบว่า iOS 26.2 Beta 1 ปรับปรุงประสิทธิภาพและอายุการใช้งานแบตเตอรี่ได้ดีกว่าเวอร์ชันก่อนหน้าหรือไม่
- ดูการทดสอบเปรียบเทียบเวอร์ชันก่อนหน้าและเวอร์ชันใหม่ล่าสุด

snippet.title: iPhone 13 Pro vs iPhone 17: Watch This Before You BUY or UPGRADE
snippet.description:
In this video, I'm comparing my old iPhone 13 Pro to the brand-new base model iPhone 17. For the first time ever, the regular iPhone 17 has a 120Hz ProMotion display, which was the main reason to buy the 13 Pro back in the day.   

My iPhone 13 Pro battery health is at 71%... and it's pretty awful. It's time to make a decision: do I just replace the battery, or is it finally time to upgrade?   

We're going to cover the huge performance gap with the new A19 chip , the new 48MP cameras , and whether losing the 3x telephoto lens  is a fair trade. We'll also talk about iOS 26, Apple Intelligence (and why it's not a dealbreaker for me ), and the all-important battery life.   

This video is for anyone still using an iPhone 13 Pro, or even an iPhone 11 or 12, trying to decide if a used 13 Pro is a good buy or if the new iPhone 17 is the right move.

IN THIS VIDEO: 
Intro: The Big Dilemma 
Why the iPhone 13 Pro Was So Special 
Design, Bezels & The NEW 120Hz Display! 
iPhone 13 Pro vs iPhone 17 Performance: A15 (6GB) vs. A19 (on iOS 26)  
iPhone 13 Pro vs iPhone 17 Battery  
iPhone 13 Pro vs iPhone 17 Camera
Apple Intelligence (Does it Really Matter?) 
My Final Verdict: Replace Battery or Upgrade?   

Let me know what you're doing in the comments! Are you upgrading or replacing the battery?
